name: MongoDBAtlasConnector
description: Manage MongoDB Atlas via the Admin API v2 — list/create/modify/delete clusters, projects, database users, and IP access list entries; read organizations, projects, snapshots, alerts, API keys, and invoices. Admin API only — wire-protocol data plane is out of scope.

install_fields.label: Atlas Public Key
install_fields.help: From Atlas → Organization → Access Manager → API Keys → Public Key

install_fields.label: Atlas Private Key
install_fields.help: Private key paired with the public key — shown only once at creation. Sent via HTTP Digest auth (RFC 7616).

install_fields.label: Default Organization ID
install_fields.help: Optional. Default Atlas Organization ID for shorthand operations.

install_fields.label: Default Project ID
install_fields.help: Atlas Project / Group ID for shorthand operations.

install_fields.label: Atlas API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the MongoDB Atlas Admin API v2. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Atlas API requests per minute. Default is 100 (Atlas standard quota).

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates public_key and private_key and marks the connector as installed.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Digest credentials by hitting GET /orgs?itemsPerPage=1.

apis.name: List Organizations
apis.description: GET /orgs — list Atlas organizations accessible to this API key.

apis.name: Get Organization
apis.description: GET /orgs/{org_id} — fetch a single Atlas organization by id.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: GET /groups — list Atlas projects (groups) accessible to this API key.

apis.name: Get Project
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id} — fetch a single Atlas project by id.

apis.name: Create Project
apis.description: POST /groups — create a new Atlas project under an organization.

apis.name: Delete Project
apis.description: DELETE /groups/{project_id} — delete an Atlas project. Irreversible.

apis.name: List Clusters
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id}/clusters — list all clusters in a project.

apis.name: Get Cluster
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id}/clusters/{cluster_name} — fetch a single cluster by name.

apis.name: Create Cluster
apis.description: POST /groups/{project_id}/clusters — provision a new Atlas cluster. Defaults to a single-shard REPLICASET on AWS US_EAST_1, M10, MongoDB 7.0 if provider_settings is omitted.

apis.name: Modify Cluster
apis.description: PATCH /groups/{project_id}/clusters/{cluster_name} — partial update of an Atlas cluster.

apis.name: Delete Cluster
apis.description: DELETE /groups/{project_id}/clusters/{cluster_name} — tear down an Atlas cluster. Irreversible.

apis.name: List Database Users
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id}/databaseUsers — list SCRAM database users for a project.

apis.name: Create Database User
apis.description: POST /groups/{project_id}/databaseUsers — create a SCRAM database user in a project.

apis.name: Delete Database User
apis.description: DELETE /groups/{project_id}/databaseUsers/{database_name}/{username} — delete a database user from a project.

apis.name: List Network Access
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id}/accessList — list the IP access list for a project.

apis.name: Add Network Access
apis.description: POST /groups/{project_id}/accessList — append IP / CIDR entries to the project access list. Each entry: {cidrBlock or ipAddress, comment}.

apis.name: List Snapshots
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id}/clusters/{cluster_name}/backup/snapshots — list Cloud Backup snapshots for a cluster.

apis.name: List Alerts
apis.description: GET /groups/{project_id}/alerts — list alerts for a project, optionally filtered by status (OPEN, CLOSED, TRACKING).

apis.name: List API Keys
apis.description: GET /orgs/{org_id}/apiKeys — list org-level programmatic API keys (read-only).

apis.name: List Invoices
apis.description: GET /orgs/{org_id}/invoices — list org-level invoices (billing surface).
